wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# LyraAlpha AI: Institutional-Grade Crypto Intelligence Platform

## Project Introduction

LyraAlpha AI is a sophisticated cryptocurrency intelligence platform designed to deliver institutional-grade market analysis and investment insights. The platform combines advanced AI-powered analysis with real-time market data to help investors navigate the complex crypto landscape with confidence.

### Purpose Statement
LyraAlpha AI aims to democratize access to sophisticated market intelligence by providing personalized investment insights, automated portfolio analysis, and real-time market monitoring capabilities that were traditionally available only to institutional investors.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- Deliver real-time, AI-powered market intelligence for cryptocurrency investments
- Provide personalized investment recommendations based on user preferences and portfolio composition
- Enable institutional-grade analysis tools for retail investors
- Maintain high standards of data accuracy and market responsiveness
- Scale efficiently while maintaining performance and reliability

### Target Audience
- Crypto investors seeking institutional-grade insights
- Traders looking for automated market analysis and recommendations
- Portfolio managers requiring real-time market intelligence
- Individual investors wanting professional-grade market analysis tools

## Technical Architecture

The LyraAlpha platform follows a modern cloud-native architecture built on Next.js 16 with TypeScript, implementing microservice patterns and advanced caching strategies.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Client Browser] --> B[Next.js App Router]
    B --> C[API Routes]
    C --> D[Service Layer]
    D --> E[Prisma ORM]
    D --> F[Redis Cache]
    E --> G[(PostgreSQL Database)]
    F --> H[Upstash Redis]
    D --> I[AI/ML Services]
    I --> J[OpenAI/Gemini APIs]
    I --> K[Vector Embeddings]
    D --> L[Stripe Payments]
    D --> M[Clerk Authentication]
    D --> N[Supabase Realtime]
```

### Component Breakdown

The architecture consists of several key layers:

**Frontend Layer**: Next.js 16 with App Router, implementing server-side rendering and static generation for optimal performance and SEO.

**API Layer**: RESTful API endpoints organized by domain (admin, user, market data, authentication).

**Service Layer**: Business logic encapsulated in service classes with clear separation of concerns.

**Data Layer**: PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM for type-safe database operations and Redis for caching.

**Integration Layer**: Third-party services including AI providers, payment processors, and market data feeds.

### Design Patterns

The project implements several key design patterns:

- **Repository Pattern**: Abstracted database access through Prisma
- **Service Layer Pattern**: Business logic encapsulation
- **Factory Pattern**: Dynamic model selection for AI services
- **Caching Strategy**: Multi-level caching with stale-while-revalidate
- **Provider Pattern**: Authentication and theme management

### System Relationships

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant API
    participant Service
    participant Cache
    participant Database
    
    Client->>API: Request Dashboard Data
    API->>Service: getShell(userId, region, plan)
    Service->>Cache: Check cache
    alt Cache Hit
        Cache-->>Service: Cached data
    else Cache Miss
        Service->>Database: Fetch fresh data
        Database-->>Service: Fresh data
        Service->>Cache: Store in cache
    end
    Service-->>API: Processed data
    API-->>Client: Response
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points

The application uses Next.js 16's App Router with the following key entry points:

- **Root Layout** (`src/app/layout.tsx`): Global application layout with theme provider and authentication wrapper
- **Dashboard Home** (`src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`): Primary user interface with personalized market intelligence
- **API Endpoints**: Organized by domain in `src/app/api/` directory

### Core Modules

**Authentication & Authorization**
- Clerk-based authentication system with role-based access control
- User preference management and plan tier validation
- Session management and security headers

**Market Intelligence Engine**
- AI-powered daily briefings and personalized recommendations
- Real-time market data processing and analysis
- Portfolio optimization and risk assessment

**Data Management**
- PostgreSQL database with comprehensive schema for crypto assets, user data, and market intelligence
- Redis caching layer for performance optimization
- Vector embeddings for semantic search and similarity matching

**Payment & Subscription Management**
- Stripe integration for subscription handling
- Credit-based system for AI feature access
- Automated billing and plan management

### Configuration Approach

**Environment Configuration** (`src/lib/env/schema.ts`):
- Zod-based validation for all environment variables
- Type-safe access patterns throughout the application
- Comprehensive validation for database, AI, payment, and security configurations

**Next.js Configuration** (`next.config.ts`):
- Advanced security headers including CSP, HSTS, and XSS protection
- Performance optimizations including image optimization and server actions
- Custom headers for different route groups and caching strategies

**Infrastructure Configuration** (`infrastructure/cdk/`):
- AWS CDK stack for database and cache provisioning
- VPC configuration with security groups
- Auto-scaling and backup configurations

### External Dependencies

Key external dependencies include:

- **AI/ML**: OpenAI, Google AI, Anthropic for language model services
- **Database**: Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for structured data
- **Caching**: Upstash Redis for high-performance caching
- **Authentication**: Clerk for user management and authentication
- **Payments**: Stripe for subscription and credit management
- **Real-time**: Supabase for real-time data synchronization
- **UI**: Radix UI primitives with custom theming

### Integration Points

**Market Data Integration**:
- Coingecko API for cryptocurrency pricing and metrics
- Yahoo Finance for traditional market data
- Custom market regime detection algorithms

**AI Integration**:
- Multiple LLM providers with fallback mechanisms
- Semantic search and vector similarity matching
- Automated content generation for market reports

**Third-party Services**:
- Email delivery via Brevo
- Webhook processing for payment events
- Analytics and monitoring integration

### Component Relationship Diagrams

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[User Interface] --> B[Dashboard Components]
    B --> C[Service Layer]
    C --> D[Data Access Layer]
    D --> E[Database]
    D --> F[Cache Layer]
    
    G[AI Services] --> C
    H[Payment Services] --> C
    I[Auth Services] --> C
    
    C --> G
    C --> H
    C --> I
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

**Personalized Market Intelligence**
- AI-powered daily briefings tailored to user preferences
- Real-time market regime detection and analysis
- Personalized watchlist recommendations
- Automated portfolio health monitoring

**Advanced Analytics**
- Multi-timeframe market analysis
- Sector rotation detection
- Risk assessment and stress testing
- Portfolio optimization suggestions

**User Experience**
- Responsive design with dark/light theme support
- Progressive Web App (PWA) capabilities
- Mobile-optimized interface
- Accessibility-focused design

### Implementation Highlights

**AI-Powered Briefings** (`src/lib/services/personal-briefing-ai.service.ts`):
- Personalized morning memos combining market context with user watchlist
- Fallback mechanisms for AI failures
- Intelligent caching with fingerprint-based invalidation

**Dashboard Intelligence** (`src/lib/services/dashboard-home.service.ts`):
- Multi-source intelligence aggregation
- Real-time data processing and normalization
- Performance-optimized caching strategy

**Portfolio Management**:
- Automated portfolio health scoring
- Risk exposure analysis
- Stress testing scenarios
- Credit-based feature access

### Feature Architecture Diagrams

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Loading
    Loading --> Processing: Data Available
    Processing --> Personalized: AI Ready
    Processing --> Fallback: AI Failed
    Personalized --> Cached: Cache Hit
    Fallback --> Cached: Cache Hit
    Cached --> Display: Render UI
    Display --> [*]: User Exit
    
    Processing --> Processing: Retry AI
    Processing --> Fallback: All Attempts Failed
```

**Performance Monitoring**:
- Real-time latency tracking for AI requests
- Cost optimization through intelligent model selection
- Cache hit ratio monitoring
- Database query performance analysis

**Security Features**:
- Comprehensive CSP implementation
- Rate limiting for API endpoints
- Input sanitization and validation
- Secure credential management

The LyraAlpha platform represents a sophisticated blend of modern web technologies, AI-powered analytics, and institutional-grade financial tools, designed to provide retail investors with access to professional-grade market intelligence and analysis capabilities.

Sources:
- [package.json](package.json)
- [next.config.ts](next.config.ts)
- [src/app/layout.tsx](src/app/layout.tsx)
- [src/lib/config.ts](src/lib/config.ts)
- [prisma/schema.prisma](prisma/schema.prisma)
- [src/lib/env/schema.ts](src/lib/env/schema.ts)
- [src/app/api/lyra/personal-briefing-ai/route.ts](src/app/api/lyra/personal-briefing-ai/route.ts)
- [src/lib/services/personal-briefing-ai.service.ts](src/lib/services/personal-briefing-ai.service.ts)
- [src/app/dashboard/dashboard-home-content.tsx](src/app/dashboard/dashboard-home-content.tsx)
- [src/lib/services/dashboard-home.service.ts](src/lib/services/dashboard-home.service.ts)
- [infrastructure/cdk/bin/cdk.ts](infrastructure/cdk/bin/cdk.ts)
- [infrastructure/cdk/lib/lyraalpha-stack.ts](infrastructure/cdk/lib/lyraalpha-stack.ts)
- [src/components/layout/navbar.tsx](src/components/layout/navbar.tsx)

</blog>
